text: To convert radians to degrees, we multiply by 180 over pi. We will approximate pi as 22 over 7.
Part (i): Convert 6 radians. Multiply 6 by 180, and then by 7 over 22, yielding approximately 343.636 degrees.
Let's convert the decimal part to minutes and seconds: 0.636 degrees times 60 is 38.18 minutes.
Next, 0.18 minutes times 60 is approximately 11 seconds. So, 6 radians is 343 degrees, 38 minutes, and 11 seconds.
Part (ii): Convert 3 over 4 radians. Multiplying by 180 over pi gives approximately 42.95 degrees.
Converting the decimal gives 42 degrees, 57 minutes, and 16 seconds.
Part (iii): Convert minus 3 radians. The minus sign remains as is. Multiplying by 180 over pi gives approximately minus 171.818 degrees.
Converting the decimal part gives minus 171 degrees, 49 minutes, and 5 seconds.
